title: COLUMBIA MEMORIAL URGENT CARE - 211info
text: SEASIDE MEDICAL GROUP COLUMBIA MEMORIAL URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for minor illnesses or injuries that do not require hospitalization but need direct attention. 1111 N Roosevelt Drive Suite 210 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 9am-6:30pm Holiday hours: 7 days per week 9am-5:30pm. Closed Thanksgiving and Christmas. (503) 738-3002 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 738-3002 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, AppleCare, and most private insurances. Sliding-scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Urgent Care Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY AND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SEASIDE MEDICAL GROUP
